framework.name: Transaction Tokens as agent authorization primitive
framework.description: Section 10.4 explicitly references Transaction Tokens for risk reduction in agent authorization chains. This confirms TxTokens (draft-ietf-oauth-transaction-tokens) are the expected mechanism for scoping agent actions within multi-hop delegation chains — not a new agent-specific token type.

source.title: draft-klrc-aiagent-auth-00 - AI Agent Authentication and Authorization
